title: Calories Burned Jump Rope (10, 20, and 30 Minute Estimates)
introduction: Jump rope can burn a lot of calories in a short time. This guide shows realistic calorie ranges by duration, body weight, and intensity so you can use jump rope workouts for fat loss.

sections.heading: 🪢 Quick Answer: Jump Rope Calories by Duration
sections.content:
| Body Weight | 10 Minutes | 20 Minutes | 30 Minutes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 120 lb (54 kg) | 90-130 kcal | 180-260 kcal | 270-390 kcal |
| 150 lb (68 kg) | 110-160 kcal | 220-320 kcal | 330-480 kcal |
| 180 lb (82 kg) | 130-190 kcal | 260-380 kcal | 390-570 kcal |
| 210 lb (95 kg) | 150-220 kcal | 300-440 kcal | 450-660 kcal |

Get your personalized number with the [Calorie Burn Calculator](/tools/calorie-burn-calculator).

sections.heading: Intensity Levels and Burn Rate
sections.content:
| Intensity | Typical Style | Burn Rate |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Low | Basic jumps, frequent breaks | Moderate |
| Moderate | Steady cadence, short rests | High |
| High | Fast intervals, double-unders | Very high |

Short high-intensity intervals can significantly raise average calorie burn.

sections.heading: How to Program Jump Rope for Fat Loss
sections.content:
Beginner-friendly template:

• 30 sec jump + 30 sec rest x 10 rounds
• Progress to 45 sec jump + 15 sec rest
• Add 1-2 rounds each week

Include strength training and protein intake to protect muscle during a deficit.

sections.heading: Common Mistakes
sections.content:
| Mistake | Fix |
| --- | --- |
| Going too hard too soon | Build volume gradually |
| Poor surface and shoes | Use supportive shoes and forgiving surface |
| Ignoring intake tracking | Log meals in Eati to preserve deficit |

Pair workout data with nutrition tracking for better outcomes.

midArticleCta: Use the calculator for your jump rope burn and track daily meals in Eati so short workouts produce real fat-loss progress.
conclusion: Jump rope is one of the highest calorie-burning cardio choices per minute. Start with manageable intervals, progress gradually, and combine your burn estimate with intake tracking in Eati for reliable results.
metaTitle: Calories Burned Jump Rope: 10, 20, and 30 Minute Chart
metaDescription: Find calories burned jump roping by duration, body weight, and intensity with practical tips to use jump rope for fat loss.

faqs.question: Is jump rope better than running for calorie burn?
faqs.answer: Per minute, jump rope can be similar or higher at vigorous intensity. The best option is the one you can perform safely and consistently.

faqs.question: How often should I jump rope for fat loss?
faqs.answer: 2-5 sessions per week works for many people, depending on recovery, fitness level, and total training volume.
